oracle_check.predicate: lambda x: isinstance(x, str) and ('<!ENTITY' in x or '%ENTITY' in x or '&xxe;' in x or 'file://' in x or 'http://' in x)
oracle_check.condition_description: lambda x: isinstance(x, str) and ('<!ENTITY' in x or '%ENTITY' in x or '&xxe;' in x or 'file://' in x or 'http://' in x)

fuzz_guidance.target_format: XML payload with external entity declarations

_meta.aliasing_risk: xml.dom.minidom.parseString may be aliased as minidom.parseString or parseString; import path is xml.dom.minidom
_meta.import_risk: Ensure xml.dom.minidom is imported in scope; may require patching xml.dom.minidom.parseString directly

mock_guidance.capture: Capture the 'bar' parameter value and parser configuration
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Mock the parseString call to avoid actual XML parsing and external entity resolution, return a safe dummy document
notes: The parser enables external entities via feature_external_ges = True
bar contains user-controlled input from request.args
Must prevent actual XXE exploitation during testing
